steps.title: Extract the three values from the table
steps.content: Tribal economic activity: $7,312,400,000. Administration/waste: $5,830,600,000. Real estate: \$18,314,700,000. The task is to order these and find which description fits the tribal contribution relative to the other two.

steps.title: Order the values and match the correct relationship
steps.content: From smallest to largest: administration/waste ($5.83 billion) < tribal economic activity ($7.31 billion) < real estate (\$18.31 billion). The tribal contribution exceeds administration/waste but falls short of real estate—a sandwich relationship. The other three choices either reverse the relationship, claim equality where numbers differ, or place tribal contribution outside the range of the other two. That matches choice A — A is correct.
